infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture photos of dental cases and scans for case tracking, documentation, and communication with the dental lab.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to attach images of dental cases, prescriptions, and documents for case tracking and communication.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone to record video of dental cases for documentation and lab communication.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to auto-fill your practice or lab address during account setup.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID to securely unlock access to patient case data and HIPAA-protected information.
